The '''Storm Skimmer Patrol Sled''' was a two-man patrol vehicle originally intended for use by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Scout trooper/Legends|scout troopers]].

==Characteristics==
Armed with only a heavy repeating [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]], the Storm Skimmers were focused towards speed and stealth, like the [[74-Z speeder bike/Legends|74-Z speeder bikes]]. However, unlike the [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bikes]], they had more armor and protection against enemy fire, and were intended for rapid deployment against enemy personnel. Later models, post-[[Battle of Endor/Legends|Endor]], would have an extra heavy repeating blaster.

The two occupants sat in tandem, with the pilot located in the rear of the craft and the gunner in the nose.

==History==
They gained in popularity around the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], but were eventually replaced by the older 74-Z speeder bike. Still, many were kept in backorder as all-purpose vehicles and would see many years of service, long into the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

Although most Skimmers served the Empire, some were captured and used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. However, non-Imperial users were forced to wear pressure-suits to achieve maximum altitudes, while [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]' armor provided a sealed environment for their protection. Maximum altitude for the Skimmers lay between 11 and 15 km from ground level.

During [[Operation Shadow Hand]], the [[Dark Empire]] used Storm Skimmer Patrol Sled to patrol the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Byss/Legends|Byss]].

==Appearances==
*[[Dark Empire 5|''Dark Empire'' 5]] {{1st}}
